name: Dump Fruit Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all the canned fruit, sugar, and coconut thoroughly in a mixing bowl.
2. Fold in the sour cream and marshmallows.
3. Transfer the mixture to a decorative serving bowl.
4. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate up to 24 hours.
5. Right before serving, garnish with a few Maraschino cherries placed on top of the salad.
